name: Prepaid Membership Dues Deferral

eligibility.description: Applies to accrual-method membership organizations (without capital stock and no earnings distributions) with service liabilities not exceeding 36 months.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Membership organizations can elect to spread the recognition of prepaid dues income over the period of the membership liability (up to 36 months).
